source_pr.title: rewrite executor.
source_pr.body: Replace "result field" with schema. Evaluate expression with indices of rows during execution.

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select max(c) from t group by d having sum(c) > 3 order by avg(c) desc") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select max(c) from t group by d having sum(c) > 3 order by avg(c) desc") (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select max(c) from t group by d having sum(c) > 3 order by avg(c) desc") (executor/executor_test.go)
